name: Red Yeast Rice
summary: Decision-ready summary: Red Yeast Rice is best framed for LDL cholesterol reduction when medically appropriate; statin-like supplement comparison; safety screen: statins; liver disease; pregnancy; CYP3A4 inhibitors.
description: Red Yeast Rice supports LDL cholesterol; cardiovascular risk factor with high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Acts like a statin when monacolin K is present; liver/muscle and drug-interaction flags are central.

claimMap.claim: v9.6: Red yeast rice can lower LDL, but monacolin K variability/statin-like risk makes it inappropriate for casual affiliate promotion.
claimMap.notes: v9.6: Red yeast rice can lower LDL, but monacolin K variability/statin-like risk makes it inappropriate for casual affiliate promotion.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Product monacolin K content varies widely; consumer dose cannot be assumed from label
